documents.title: Acme Brand Guidelines
documents.content:
# Acme Brand Guidelines

## Colors
- Primary: #FF6B35
- Secondary: #004E89

## Typography
- Headlines: Inter Bold
- Body: Inter Regular

## Voice & Tone
- Professional but approachable
- Clear and concise
- Solution-oriented

documents.title: Acme Q1 Strategy
documents.content:
# Acme Q1 2026 Strategy

## Goals
1. Launch redesigned homepage
2. Improve mobile conversion by 15%
3. Reduce page load time to under 2s

## Key Deliverables
- Homepage redesign (March)
- Performance audit (February)
- A/B testing framework (January)

documents.title: Design System Principles
documents.content:
# Oxy Design System Principles

## Accessibility First
All components must meet WCAG 2.1 AA.

## Composable
Build small, reusable primitives.

## Performance
No component should add > 5KB to bundle.

## Documentation
Every component needs usage examples and prop docs.
